hotel_name: Nam An Mama Villa Hội An (Nam An Mama Villa Hoi An)

reviews.title: Deceptive hotel
reviews.text:
I booked this room based on the photos, which showed upper-floor rooms with nice balcony views. However, when I checked in, I was taken to the basement. I was shocked. Upon checking my order again, I noticed the fine print saying "basement room" next to the picture. This is very misleading and disappointing.

Additionally, there were mosquitoes buzzing around at midnight and I got bitten. I asked the staff for repellent, but they didn't have any. Also, no free water was provided.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: breakfast is not bad for three stars and very nice staff.
reviews.negatives: Mold and no sound insulation at all.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text:
the facilities should upgrade. The water from the shower head don’t know go where just dun at the middle. The room light was spoil too. 
The bed & tower are not clean too.

reviews.title: Ít was nice but there are definitely things that could improve with regard to regard to the services provided.
reviews.positives: The building is nice and I loved all the plants and trees 😍 The location was good as it wasn’t far from the beach, ancient town or Vinwonders.
reviews.negatives: Thế tv in the room wasn’t really that accessible. we brought an HDMI cable with us so we could make use of our laptops but the TV only played audio. We stayed two nights and after the first night, no one came to clean the room and give us new towels or toilet paper. That was very strange to me. The breakfast, which was included,  was decent but the eggs and bacon were really oily unfortunately. We couldn’t access the pool the first day we arrived, as it needed to be cleaned 🥲

reviews.title: Basement room
reviews.text: We booked a deluxe room, but they provided us basement room, which was not vanilated also the hotel is very basic

reviews.title: Good hotel, get a room on a higher floor.
reviews.positives: The room, facilities and staff were all very good. There is a very nice pool on the roof, I did not use it but did take a look.  The location is about a 20 minute walk from the old quarter but the area is walkable and has plenty of restaurants, temples etc and I enjoyed walking around there.  There is an elevator as well.
reviews.negatives: The location of the room: the room I had was on the ground floor directly facing the street.  My view was of parked motorbikes and the street (also some nice plantings) so I had to keep my curtains drawn since my entire room was visible from the outside.  I think if I had been on a higher floor I would have enjoyed my stay much more. While I can recommend this hotel, ask for a room on a higher floor!

reviews.title: Mixed Feelings About My Stay
reviews.text:
While the location offers easy access to shopping and the airport, the walkability leaves much to be desired.
The facilities are decent, but the pool and garden could use some improvement. Cleanliness was not up to par, and the staff's service could be better. Overall, there are some positives, but several areas need attention to enhance the overall experience.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Good location
reviews.negatives: Facilities are not as new as in pictures. Door lock didn’t work twice during our 3-day stay. Property tried to take charge on re-rent motorbike service.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text:
프론트 직원 엄청 불친절해요
숙소 위치가 애매해요 주변에 아무것도 없어서 어디갈려면 무조건 택시타야해요
객실 문 고장나서 잘안열렸고, 샤워기 수압이 너무 약해서 샤워하는데 불편했어요. 
체크아웃 시간 12시인데 10시에 밥먹으려고 나갈려는데 왜 체크아웃안하냐 12시전에 무조건 체크아웃해라 아님 지금 체크아웃해라 이런식이네요;;

reviews.title: Lovely hotel close to the old town
reviews.positives: Great value, beautiful rooms, friendly staff , very nice pool, good location a short drive away from the old town, with a convenience store next door and some restaurants nearby too.
reviews.negatives: The door was very temperamental and at times difficult to open. Water didn’t flow properly out of the shower head, and the toilet paper was of very poor quality. These are minor issues considering the value for money but I feel like they could easily be fixed.

reviews.title: ห้องเก่า ห้องน้ำเปียกหมด น้ำเบา
reviews.text: ห้องเก่า ห้องน้ำเปียกหมด น้ำเบา เตียงนุ่ม อาหารเช้าดี

reviews.title: Great staff and value, close to all the fun
reviews.positives: Great staff and location a ride or mid-distance walk to all the fun of Hoi An.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: The toilet is terrible

reviews.title: Really enjoyed it, would go back
reviews.positives: The staff was very helpful and the location was perfect for us. Close enough to the market and tourist spots, far enough away that it was nice and quiet. I think we were the only ones to use the rooftop pool when we were there, and the bicycles were great for a 20/30-minute ride to An Bang beach. Definitely recommend.
reviews.negatives: N/A

reviews.title: Friendly staff and good service for local attractions
reviews.text:
We stayed here for three nights and truly appreciated the dedication of all the staff, especially in helping us book local tours and attractions around Hoi An, including Cu Lao Cham, Basket Boat rides, and the Hoi An Memory Show. Unfortunately, our experience with the hotel’s location, cleanliness, breakfast, and sleep comfort was less positive.

The bedding—polyester sheets and quilt covers—was uncomfortable given the hot weather (~35–38°C). We had to keep the air conditioner on at night, but this created another problem: without a blanket, it was too cold, and with a blanket, it was too hot. As a result, we often woke up during the night and didn’t have a restful sleep throughout our stay.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: The room was spacious and exactly like the pictures
reviews.negatives: The price was higher than the overall value of the room

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: Very far from restaurant and old city. Not suitable place for staying.

reviews.title: Good enough
reviews.positives: The staffs are really nice and friendly. They do speak English quite well. Swimming pool is great. The breakfast was excellent! The room is clean and spacious. There’s also a minimarket beside the hotel.
reviews.negatives: We stayed in the basement room. The room is nice but we are annoyed by the noise from people above our bedroom when they’re shifting some chairs even at midnight.

reviews.title: Our stay at Nam An Mamma Villa
reviews.text: Nice accommodation, stunning room, and good service. The staff gave us a map with the must go-to places in Hoi An. It was a little far, but doable. Breakfast was limited, but okay as well.

reviews.title: Exceptional customer service, convenient location and room as pictured
reviews.positives:
The location was out of the hustle and bustle of Hoi An city centre but a short drive or bicycle away.  The property offers the use of bicycles at no extra cost but if you prefer the comfort of an air conditioned vehicle Lisa and the staff can organise transport for you.

The room was clean, bed was comfortable and amenities were great.  The room we had was as pictured although some of the soft furnishings and decor were omitted. 

The staff were extremely helpful and made us feel welcomed.  They went above and beyond expectations and rival any 5 star property with their customer service.

The included breakfast had great variety and new fruits to try! On days when we had an early morning tour we were provided with a takeaway Bahn mi.

The laundry service was also very good and prompt.

Access to a swimming pool after a day in the heat was most welcomed.  

If you are looking for a value for money property with exceptional customer service consider staying here.

reviews.title: Good value for money
reviews.text: The price is reasonable and offers good value overall. However, the location is quite far from the old town and the night market. That said, the hotel provides bicycles, which makes it easy to ride to the beach or into the old town.

reviews.title: Beautiful stay in Hoi An
reviews.positives: Lovely and small hotel,close to a few amenities like restaurants and a big convenience store right next door. They offer many tours and day trips that you can take. The internet is strong as I was working while traveling. The breakfast was great as you get a la cart as well as a bunch of extras every morning.
reviews.negatives: Not VERY close to old town, but a good 15-20 minute walk, the grabs are also very cheap, so no problem.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: The hotel is quite close to the ancient town of Hoi An. You can move around by the hotel's (free) bicycles. Breakfast is a buffet where you choose the main dish in advance from the time of check-in (acceptable). I was quite disappointed with the cleanliness of the hotel at check-in; the bathroom floor still had cigarette butts and the previous guest's underwear hung in the room. The room was filled with the smell of cigarettes and was addressed right after. The lighting in the room is a bit dim. I hope the hotel can improve the thorough cleaning before guests check in.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: The staff is wonderful. The breakfast is good and there are free bicycles for use.
reviews.negatives: Limescale buildup on shower/sink. Stains in the bathroom along the walls.

reviews.title: I didn't really enjoy it
reviews.text: I only stayed one night, the hotel service and staff were friendly, but I took a room in the basement which prevented me from enjoying my stay, I felt locked in with no daylight, there were stains on the sheets which also frustrated me I'm not convinced I think the upstairs rooms looked much warmer, on the other hand if you're looking for peace and quiet this is the right place it's quite far from Hoi An.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Room style, nice staff
reviews.negatives: Location

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: If you want something near the old town, I don't recommend it since you need to take a grab more often going back and fort from this accommodation. We also had problems with the bathroom drainage. What makes it special is the staff, very kind and accommodating. Swimming pool is good with city view.

reviews.title: Staff were amazing ,  pool on roof was great , and room
reviews.positives: Lovely rooms , extremely good value
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Great choice in Hoian
reviews.text: We had a great stay at Nam An Mama hotel. It’s hard to remember the name but the stay was memorable. The staff was exceptional and even helped change rooms when our room had a small issue. Highly recommended!

reviews.title: Best staff ever.
reviews.positives: My wife and I stayed 17 nights at this hotel we both can honestly say that Thuy,Muoi, and the house keeping staff made our stay here memorable to say the least, they showed us both so much kindness during our stay, it was shown on so many occasions,my birthday was one such occasion where out of their own money gave me a birthday cake and sang to me,we will never forget them.Graeme and Katrina.
reviews.negatives: N/A

reviews.title: Hoi An August stay
reviews.text:
Nam An Mama was a decent stay for the price point. It’s on the more affordable side and includes nice perks like free breakfast, free use of bikes, a big comfortable bed, and a pool.

That said, most of these were just okay. Breakfast had fruit, bread, yogurt, plus one hot dish (noodles, eggs, or banh mi). The room was spacious, but the restroom could use improvement—the shower nozzle kept falling off, the pressure was so strong it splashed onto the sink (where all the toiletries were laid out), and the water temperature couldn’t be adjusted.

Staff were polite but not very engaging, aside from offering tour packages. Location-wise, it’s about a 15–20 minute walk from most restaurants and tailors (not the center ones, those tailors were probably a 30 minute walk) though Grab rides were cheap and convenient just around 25,000 VND from Nam An Mama so it’s okay.

Overall, it was a fair stay for the budget, but with some areas that could be improved.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
The room is cute, new and clean. It’s exactly the same as the photos.
I felt comfortable and peaceful during my stay.
Minibar with reasonable price (not expensive compared to buying the things outside), very convenient.
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Good Stay, but Staff Attitude Needs Improvement
reviews.text: I have no complaints except that the staff seemed a bit indifferent compared to other places I stayed during this trip. The hotel should pay more attention to the attitude of the receptionists toward guests.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Great stay that’s nicely situated between the old town, beautiful rice fields and the beach. It’s easy to get around using the hotel’s bikes or grab. I especially enjoyed the rooftop pool and the design of the room (just like the photos). The staff were friendly, kind, and accommodating. I stayed here for 10 days and would stay again!

reviews.title: Value for money
reviews.text: The stay was pleasant, rooms were good but had some house fly in & around. Try to avoid basement rooms.

reviews.title: Relaxing, beautiful villa near Old Town with indulgent breakfast
reviews.positives: Really lovely property with beautiful rooms and furnishings, located a short bike ride or 20-min walk from historic old town. The staff is truly wonderful, kind, helpful and full of recommendations. The breakfast is also very exceptional—you order from a robust menu the day before, and your dish is prepared when you arrive to breakfast, with light fruit, pastries, yogurt, cereal and beverages also available.
reviews.negatives: My only suggestion is that if you are sensitive to noise, bring earplugs. I stayed on the first floor, and at at times you could hear activity at the reception desk or a generator outside. Not a dealbreaker at all though.

reviews.title: The bedroom is very comfortable.
reviews.text: Clean and has a retro style. The cleaning staff is here every day. I read other people's reviews saying the staff is friendly, but when I encountered them, they weren't as cheerful as others who stayed, probably because I'm not a foreigner. But it wasn't a big deal. The accommodation is not far from many attractions. You can take a cheap Grab or rent a car; it’s not far from the lodgings. If I have the opportunity, I will stay again.

reviews.title: Very comfortable
reviews.positives:
I have stayed in this villa for three weeks, and it’s been a real pleasure!
The location is great, just on the outskirts of the old town, you can walk or ride the free bikes provided. 
The staff have helped me with absolutely everything from sorting my SIM card to ensuring everything during my stay was perfect. 
The beds are super comfy and very big! Would recommend to friends and would stay here again for sure!
reviews.negatives: N/A

reviews.title: Nice small hotel
reviews.text: Just on the outskirts of Hoi An, this is a nice small hotel.  With the free bikes, it has easy access to An Bang beach and around the Hoi An area.  Close toa local neighbourhood

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: It was so cute and quaint. Everyone was kind and generous. We had everything we needed.

reviews.title: It was a great and beautiful space for relaxation.
reviews.text: First of all, all the staff were very kind! When people you meet while traveling are friendly, it makes the experience so much better, and I have nothing but memories of kindness during my stay at this accommodation. The trees and plants were so beautifully arranged that waking up every morning brought me happiness, and I enjoyed the time spent just looking at the grass while waking up early in the morning. The breakfast had many options to choose from, and I think everything was delicious overall. On the last day, I used the transfer service to another hotel for a fee, and the staff were so kind, it left me with great memories until the end! If I visit Hoi An again, I would definitely want to stay at this place again. Thank you for the wonderful memories! Hehe!!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Loved the style of this boutique hotel. The staff was very attentive and  helpful. Great breakfast. Wonderful stay!

reviews.title: very cute hotel
reviews.text: cutest hotel in hoi an, little far from old town but they provide free cycle to get around hoi an . around 1.5 km from ancient town and night market

reviews.title: Can’t wait to come back
reviews.positives:
I LOVEEEE THE AESTHETICS!! 

The aesthetics sold me on the booking, but overall I loved our experience. The front desk concierge was so helpful, welcoming and joyful. Helped us a lot on things to do in the area.

I highly recommend this place. Definitely coming back in a few months with my family.

Also, loved the breakfast. Bonus* free bike rentals!
reviews.negatives: N/A

reviews.title: Value for money!
reviews.text: The Prices hotel compared with the size of the rooms are cheaper than I expect. There have porch and good view . From hotel to old town about 6-7 mins. Breakfast i order is banh mi was very good .

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: The staff was very friendly and helpful:) the room was great: clean, quiet, good wi-fi:)
reviews.negatives: Evething was great

reviews.title: What a nice vacation!
reviews.text: We booked our rooms on the third floor and got a flower plantation scene out the window. It’s beautiful and remind us the beauty of nature in the up-country.  The most impressive was the  super quick laundry service as we were out  and get wet in the rain at the evening so we requested for the service . We got our neat and clean cloths back by tomorrow morning.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: El personal muy amable, te prestan bicicletas gratis y te informan de todo
reviews.negatives: Nuestra habitación estaba en el sótano, olía el baño entero a pis y había cucarachas por varios sitios. La habitación no estaba mal, pero entrar al baño sin ventana era un horror

reviews.title: nice hotel
reviews.text: Khách sạn đẹp, thiết kế indochine đặc trưng hội an. Nhân viên dễ thương, luôn cười và vui vẻ hỗ trợ khách. Đồ ăn sáng không xuất sắc nhưng đầy đủ món và có menu cho bạn chọn trước, đã gồm trong giá phòng. Giường nệm êm, rộng thoải mái. Khách sạn mới nên đồ đạc còn mới, chỉ có điều vòi sen phong 101 toilet bị toé nước khi sử dụng hơi bất tiện xíu. Mình book chỗ này vì ở giữa đường ra trung tâm và biển an bàng, nên đối với mình vị trí rất thuận lợi. Mọi thứ đều vừa đủ tốt, cho 4/5 nhen

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Habitación espaciosa, buen diseño, limpio, colchón y almohadas muy cómodas. El personal súper atento. Y Lo mejor puedes alquilar una moto o bici y llegar al old town en 5 minutos. Me gustó el jardín. La sopa de fideos con pollo al desayuno muy rico y sano.
reviews.negatives: El desayuno podría ser más variado y ofrecer más variedad de tés. Sugiero hacerse en las habitaciones de los pisos de arriba con balcón.
